/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/idyl.dir/src/parser/idyl.tab.cc.o CMakeFiles/idyl.dir/src/parser/lex.yy.cc.o CMakeFiles/idyl.dir/src/idyl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/idyl.dir/src/parser/parse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/idyl.dir/src/semantic/analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/idyl.dir/src/core/evaluator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/idyl.dir/src/vm/compiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/idyl.dir/src/vm/vm.cpp.o -o idyl  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: _deps/rtmidi-build/librtmidi.a /usr/local/lib/libcsound64.so -ljack
